texto: To me, being appropriatedoes not always mean conforming. Often it means justthe opposite. Sometimes, refusing to conform and even confrontingis not only appropriate but necessary to change theworld for the better.
explicacao: Citação de Donda West sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “To me, being appropriatedoes not always mean conforming. Often it means justthe opposite. Sometim…” articula reflexao, change, being em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e reflexao.
